titleStmt.title: SII 16.256: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 256. (A.R. No. 445 of 1911.) RĀYACHŌṬI, RAYACHOTI TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vīrabhadrasvamin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Pushya śu. 10, corresponding to 1563 A.D., January 4.

The inscription records that Puchchalapāṭi Rāmayya, the mudra officer under Amarināyani Veṅgaḷanāyani-gāru, the kāryakarta of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jilleḷa Raṅgapatirājayyadēva-mahārāja had the central shrine and the sukhanāsi of the god Vīrēśvara of Rāchavīḍu repaired. It is said that the donor held the pārupatya of Rāmadurga-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1484 Agunēṁṭi duṁdubhi
saṁvatsara puṣya śu 10 lu śrīmaṁmmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sa
tāsivadēvamahārāyala Ayyavāru vidyānagaramaṁdu(maṁdu) vajraśiṁhvāsanādhīśvarulai pṛthivi
sāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu svastiśrī śrīdakṣaṇakāsi nivāsulayina śrīrācavīṭi vīrabhadra
dēvuniki kāśyapagōtrapavitṛlayina śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍalēśvara jilleḷla raṁgapatirājayyadēva mahā
rājula Ayyavāri kā¨ryyaka¨rttalayina Amarināyani veṁgaḷanāyaniṁgāru daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci
rāmadu¨rgaṁśīma pārupatyaṁ śēstāvuṁḍi vīrēśvaruni ga¨rbhagṛhaṁ suganāsiṁni jiṁ¨rnōdhāraṇaṁ AI
vuṁnagānu raṁgapatirājayyavāriki puṇyaṁgānu tama mudramanuṣyuṁḍu puccelapāṭi rā maya
dēvuḍi ga¨rbhagṛhamuṁnu suganāsiṁni nnu[saṁpū¨rṇaṁ]gānu sēyiṁcenū .
Digital edition of SII 16.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
